name: PEV Charging - The Wheel of Brisbane #4

tags.description: Located on light post next to stairs to underground carpark for performing arts centre
Located on wall opposite H24 Cafe.
Multiple 10a GPO. 2x Single. 1x Dual. Located next to ATM and McDowell Family Medical Center. second GPO located on post 15m towards discount store next to car parking.
2x10a GPO. On back corner of building near gas meter and power distribution boxes
In garden on corner of building near fire hydrant Booster box. also 2 GPO inside car park near fire panel behind locked gate. You can reach through the gate to access the power points.
2x10a GPO on post next to for tree on river bank. Tree igjts plugged in so not suitable for night. May be turned off during the day. Other power point in the area.
Two dual GPO on front of coffee shop
At rear of outdoor dining area near entrance to Children Play Gym Equipment. Dual GPO

Dual GPO in covered areas inside Track near start stop line. Sometimes is off as the power point us lockable. Also second Dual GPO at other covered areas around Track on last straight before main building.

On the wall at Queens Wharf just east of the Public Toilets

Location on build at rear or the Brookfield General Store
